props.ChoiceText: A route others had missed or abandoned opened under your judgment and changed what movement through that country could mean.
props.ChoiceBio: Finding the pass taught you how a single decision in bad country can change trade and memory together.

0.TransitionText: Because finding the pass taught you how a single decision in bad country can change trade and memory together, exploration could harden into mapping the world for others as a cartographer.
0.TransitionPrompt: This discovery could carry you into cartography, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because finding the pass taught you how a single decision in bad country can change trade and memory together, routes and strange goods taught you to live by exchange.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Merchant, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because finding the pass taught you how a single decision in bad country can change trade and memory together, exploration opened onto a different frontier.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Courtier, but you may remain on your current path instead.
